name: Add Suppliers
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up your suppliers in Neto is a two stage process, creating your suppliers, then assigning them to your products:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Suppliers in Neto"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a new supplier and add the supplier details:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Suppliers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the top right hand side. Fill in your suppliers details and click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Repeat this process for your remaining suppliers."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Ensure your billing and shipping addresses are added. Address information should be your suppliers address. It is used during a purchase order creation to determine whether tax is applied. The shipping address should be your suppliers return address for RMA's."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Suppliers in Purchase Orders"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suppliers can also be created on the fly when creating a purchase order. When creating a purchase order, select the "}, {"text": "Suppliers", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu, and click "}, {"text": "+ Create New Supplier", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Assign Suppliers to Products"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suppliers that are created in Neto can be assigned to products individually, or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1437-add-suppliers#4", "children": [{"text": "in bulk"}]}, {"text": ". To assign suppliers to products individually:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "and click on the "}, {"text": "Warehouse & Picking", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab on the left hand side menu. Select your "}, {"text": "Primary Supplier", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the product you wish to add a supplier to."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps for any other products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Assign Suppliers to Products in Bulk"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Suppliers can be added to products in bulk using the export and import wizards:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the top right hand side, click the "}, {"text": "Export", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select "}, {"text": "Export CSV file with all fields", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the CSV file and fill out the "}, {"text": "Primary Supplier", "bold": true}, {"text": " column with the Supplier ID (not the name) which is located on the supplier card created in the previous steps."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once you've completed the CSV file, save and close and use the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "Product Import Wizard"}]}, {"text": " to update your products."}]}]}]}]
